summary.en: Switzerland-facing solar inverters for grid use require project-level interconnection coordination with Swissgrid and local network operators. Approval typically covers connection documents, single-line diagrams, metering strategy, anti-islanding settings, reactive-power behavior, and commissioning evidence before energisation.
summary.zh: 面向瑞士并网的光伏逆变器需要与Swissgrid和当地网络运营商进行项目级并网协调。批准通常涵盖并网文件、单线图、计量策略、防孤岛设置、无功行为和投运前投运验收证据。
summary.zht: 面向瑞士併網的光伏逆變器需要與Swissgrid及當地網絡營運商進行項目級併網協調。批准通常涵蓋併網文件、單線圖、計量策略、防孤島設置、無功行為和投運前投運驗收證據。

standards_or_laws: ElCom electricity-market and network oversight framework

summary.en: China grid procedures under GB/T 19964 and GB/T 37408 can support technical preparation, but project-level Swissgrid route and operator-specific commissioning requirements must be established independently for the destination site.
summary.zh: 中国GB/T 19964和GB/T 37408下的并网程序可支持技术准备，但瑞士应按Swissgrid路径和项目特定的运营商验收要求独立建立目的地场站文件。
summary.zht: 中國GB/T 19964和GB/T 37408下的併網程序可支持技術準備，但瑞士應按Swissgrid路徑和項目特定的營運商驗收要求獨立建立目的地場站文件。

standards_or_laws: China State Grid / China Southern Power Grid project procedures

gap.en: The gap is the operational acceptance pack: utility project approval path, interface and relay settings, anti-islanding and LVRT/UVRT details, metering and telemetry readiness, and documented commissioning test acceptance for the selected Swiss connection point.
gap.zh: 差距在于运营验收包，包括电网项目批准路径、接口与继电保护参数、防孤岛与低压穿越细节、计量与遥测就绪、以及针对瑞士接入点的调试验收证明。
gap.zht: 差距在於營運驗收包，包括電網項目批准路徑、接口與繼電保護參數、防孤島與低壓穿越細節、計量與遙測就緒、以及針對瑞士接入點的調試驗收證明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for project-level grid interconnection and commissioning under Swissgrid-relevant routes.
mandatory_status.cn: Not equivalent — China grid-connection procedures do not replace Swissgrid and local operator acceptance.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Swissgrid interconnection as a separate project gate from product testing. Confirm operator-specific settings for the exact site and inverter configuration.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 将Swissgrid并网视为产品测试之外的独立项目门槛。请确认目标场站和逆变器配置对应的运营商具体参数。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 將Swissgrid併網視為產品測試之外的獨立項目門檻。請確認目標場站和逆變器配置對應的營運商具體參數。
